basics.name: Nguyen Hoang Long
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Backend-focused .NET Developer with {{ yoe }} years of experience building stable and easy-to-maintain systems. I like solving challenging problems, improving system performance, and using best practices in real projects. I am a self-motivated and responsible developer who is always learning, with the goal of becoming a senior developer and contributing to meaningful products.

location.address: 58/5D, Street No. 9, Linh Tay Ward, Thu Duc City

work.name: BLogic Systems
work.summary: BLogic Dashboard is a support application designed for POS systems. It helps agents manage merchants through a hierarchical model, create support tickets, and generate registration forms using DocuSign. It also integrates with external systems such as TSYS to handle legal documentation.
highlights: Developing and maintaining web applications using .NET Core, C#, and SQL Server. Collaborating with the team to implement new features and fix bugs.
responsibilities: Translated business requirements into technical solutions and planned modular development tasks.
Designed database schema and developed scalable modules with optimized SQL queries.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins for automated deployment to Linux environments.
Integrated TSYS payment gateway, ensuring secure and reliable transaction processing.
achievements: Delivered end-to-end payment integrations, gaining deep understanding of payment processing workflows.
Implemented DocuSign integration to enable secure and streamlined electronic signature processes.
Built scalable PDF rendering pipelines and integrated Amazon S3 for reliable document storage.

work.name: Silicon Stack
work.summary: WECRM is a customer relationship management system that allows vehicle management and reminds users to perform maintenance services at dealerships.
highlights: Contributed to a major project that streamlined internal workflows, improving efficiency by 30%
responsibilities: Collaborated with stakeholders to define requirements and implementation plans.
Maintained and refactored codebase, fixed bugs, and optimized database queries.
Applied best practices to improve system performance and code quality.
achievements: Delivered a vehicle management and maintenance scheduling feature.
Built strong domain knowledge in CRM systems (customer lifecycle, lead management, sales workflows).
Improved API performance and reliability through advanced C# and query optimization.

work.name: Silicon Stack
work.summary: Promotion Planning is a pricing management module within the manufacturing domain that helps users manage and optimize product pricing for supermarkets in Australia and New Zealand.
highlights: Contributed to a major project that streamlined internal workflows, improving efficiency by 30%
responsibilities: Collaborated with the team to define requirements and implementation plans.
Deployed, maintained, refactored, and resolved production issues.
Reviewed and managed code changes using Bitbucket workflows.
Managed Azure Pipelines, IIS web servers, and database operations.
achievements: Delivered enhanced authentication features, improving system security.
Developed domain expertise in pricing systems, including product pricing, promotions, and inventory management.
Improved API performance and reliability through advanced C# and database query optimization.
Integrated SharePoint for storing and managing generated reports in a centralized document system.

volunteer.summary: Helped organize coding workshops and mentored new members.

projects.name: GitOps Flow
projects.description: GitOps-based CI/CD pipeline for microservices on Kubernetes.
highlights: CI with GitHub Actions (build, push GHCR, update GitOps repo)
CD with ArgoCD auto-sync from GitOps repository
Deployed on Kubernetes with Traefik ingress
End-to-end flow: code → image → GitOps → deploy
